summary: Current source reaches the original four-task product-data surface from a W1450 field-data input, but product success remains blocked because the W1450 input is not nullary. A Lean proof-search probe shows that constructing W1450 from no assumptions leaves exactly four provider-package obligations: W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W984 target/closed-embedding closedness data, and W950 normalized-source/endpoint-localized-unit data. The canonical stable-instance route also fails at the first missing Preadditive (Dbounded MetrizableLCA) instance.
obligations_discharged: No final original four-task obligation is discharged by this handoff.
The proof-search boundary is made precise by a Lean attempt that exposes the four W1450 constructor obligations.
The canonical typeclass route is checked far enough to show that the stable package is not currently nullary.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The W1450 frontier is confirmed as the shortest currently checked ProductData route after the W1450-to-W1625 bridge.
The next source patch is narrowed to nullary W1450 field data, the four W1450 provider-package inhabitants, or a stronger nullary stable package.
Further wrapper or unpacking routes are not justified unless they construct one of those missing inhabitants.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.

The four W1450 provider packages remain caller-supplied: Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitBoundaryDataW716, Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryRelationDataProviderW717, Dbounded.TargetNoUnivClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW984, and Dbounded.NormalizedSourceTriangulationEndpointLocalizedUnitDataProviderW950.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide a nullary BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage because Preadditive (Dbounded MetrizableLCA) and later stable instance families are missing.
remaining_work: Construct Dbounded.nullaryW987FieldDataConstructionInputW1450 from real mathematical source declarations, or provide the four W1450 provider-package inhabitants directly.
Alternatively prove a stronger nullary BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage by supplying the concrete Dbounded MetrizableLCA stable instance families.
Use the nullary stable package to define the original four-task positive witness declarations and run the Tier C review packet before permitting update_goal complete.
